---
title: "H: Systemic hormonal preparations, excluding sex hormones and insulins"
date: "2026-02-08"
---

| Level 2 code | Description |
| ---: | :--- |
| H01 | Pituitary and hypothalamic hormones and analogues |
| H02 | Corticosteroids for systemic use |
| H03 | Thyroid therapy |
| H04 | Pancreatic hormones |
| H05 | Calcium homeostasis |

: ATC H level 2 codes {#tbl-atc-h-lvl-2 tbl-colwidths="[20, 80]"}
